QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: minimalMode
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Minimal mode will pull only selected parameters from the drone when connected.

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: trackingRate

QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Tracking rate

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: cacheVehicleParameters
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Cache vehicle parameters using UID of the FCU

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: autoConfigureStream
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Configure stream automatically if the stream has corresponding info.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Auto configure video stream

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: enableVGMDialect
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Use custom MAVLink messages to communicate with VGM.
